name: Skywork AI
description: Kunlun-backed Chinese LLM lab (昆仑万维 天工) offering Skywork MoE and Skywork-13B models plus agentic search.

seo.title: Skywork AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Skywork AI: Kunlun-backed Chinese LLM lab (昆仑万维 天工) offering Skywork MoE and Skywork-13B models plus agentic search.

when_to_use: Accessing Skywork's open-source LLMs for reasoning-heavy tasks
Running mathematical and code reasoning with Skywork-o1 models
Fine-tuning Skywork models on domain-specific enterprise data
Benchmarking open Chinese models for logic and coding tasks

pros: Strong Chinese benchmarks at low cost
review.verdict: Decent open-weight Chinese LLMs plus agentic search, best used self-hosted rather than via hosted API.
review.best_for: Chinese-market teams or open-weight fans running models on their own GPUs
review.not_for: Regulated Western firms sending data to China-hosted inference
